DP.441.0000:
We’re a traveling troupe of street
performers.\f
In place of a formal introduction,
please take this!\f
DP.441.0001:
Trick Room is a doozy of a weird
time-twister move.\f
Use it, and for a while afterward,
the slowest Pokémon move first!\f
Before the faster can move, the
slowest gets to attack!\f
How you use the move is up to
you, Trainer...
DP.441.0002:
Let me gaze into your eyes...
I will read your fortune...\f
...\f
DP.441.0003:
A magical encounter is in the winds...\f
Though I cannot tell whether it be
a Pokémon or a Trainer...
DP.441.0004:
A brief occasion of joy is imminent...\f
But remember this: the good and the
bad are on opposite sides of a coin...
DP.441.0005:
An unseeable accident lurks...\f
Whether you succumb to it or rise
above, it all depends on you...
DP.441.0006:
Destiny shall shift...\f
Whether that bodes well or ill is
beyond the spectrum of my sight...
DP.441.0007:
Many are the eyes that I have gazed
into over the years, be they human\r
or Pokémon...\f
But your eyes swirl with compassion,
strength, joy, sorrow, and more...\f
The ever-shifting colors in your eyes
make you difficult to read...
DP.441.0008:
Me, I’m just a simple soul.
I let my guitar do all my talking.\f
All I need is music and Pokémon.\f
I can shine wherever I go if I have
those things in my life.
